title: Two Dots — Approve faster and boost your bottom line
text:
Meet Eve, our conversational underwriting agent that uses 100% automation and real-time approvals to accelerate revenue.
Hello, I’m Eve. I’m here to speed up your application. Let’s start by verifying your identity.
Eve
Sure, here’s my ID and SSN
ID.jpg
SSN
87946512389465
James Smith
Constructing and verifying identity...
Thanks! I’ve now verified your identity, James. What’s the main source of your income?
Eve
My main income is from gig work and some benefits
benefits_letter.pdf
Screenshot 2025-06.jpg
James Smith
Extracting data and checking for fraud...
That’s great. It looks like you’ve uploaded screenshots instead of an official document. Please share one of the following or connect your bank account:
